name: WoWWatchlist
short: Track WoW characters and post weekly Mythic+ / raid progress (raider.io).
description: Keep a watchlist of WoW characters and post a weekly summary of their Mythic+ score and raid progression via raider.io. Characters are managed from the web dashboard. Opt-in per guild, bilingual (DE/EN).
author: Domekologe
install_msg:
Thanks for installing WoWWatchlist!

Load it with `[p]load wowwatchlist`, then configure it via its commands or the PDC web dashboard (if installed).
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores per-server configuration and the World of Warcraft character names being tracked. It does not persistently store personal data about Discord users.
